allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: enable map feature + stream map.player position *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'map calib: show live world pos paired with tapped pixel *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'map: calibrate projection to real FNV coords \(Goodsprings/Novac/The Fort\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: real weapon/armor condition % + equipped state \(per-stack ExtraHealth/ExtraWorn\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: condition-adjusted value + FNV damage formula \(condition x skill\) to match Pip-Boy *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'inventory: show weapon/apparel weight with decimals \(light items no longer round to 0\) *)
